name: Inhibitor Therapeutics, Inc.
summary: Inhibitor Therapeutics, Inc. (INTI) is a Delaware-incorporated biopharmaceutical company focused on developing and commercializing therapeutic product candidates. The company seeks to advance its pipeline through clinical trials requiring FDA or other regulatory approval, and pursues securing development and commercialization partners. Specific product candidates are not detailed in the provided section of the filing.
